description: Mitch discusses the unexpected success of his project, initially anticipating a market cap of 2 million but achieving much more. He reflects on his experiences and interactions with other influencers, including a Twitter space with Frank. The conversation touches on market conditions and personal growth.
topic_summary: Mitch shares insights on his project's performance, market conditions, and his interactions with other influencers, including a notable Twitter space with Frank [t=40:56].
